title: We all missed what the 12th Angel really is in Q
display_title: We all missed what the 12th Angel really is in Q
wikitext:
[]: We all missed what the 12th Angel really is in Q.             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Feb 28, 2014 4:07 am Are you ready to have your minds blown? Setting: Shinji, Rei, and Kaworu are in the Terminal Dogma. Shinji has the spears removed. A previously-inanimate Mark 06 strangely twists around as two multi-colour halos appear over it's head. Rei lops off Mark 06's head and suddenly, the 12th angel[s](Leliel)[/s] bursts free. The entirety of Q is very ambiguous but nothing more than these next few scenes. However, if you'll read along, you will understand that this is not entirely the 12th angel. Before I continue, I want to draw our attention back to the original Neon Genesis Evangelion series. This is crucial to understanding exactly what I am about to show you, so please, follow along. Before the 12th angel, there was the 11th angel. This angel went by the name of Ireul. It was never a strong focus in the series. This angel was pictured as a small bacterial rash. It infected Evangelion units for the purpose of control and to gather intelligence. It was a remarkably intelligent angel for it's size. Here is what it appeared as. It also had a strange AT field presence when being pinned down with lasers. The field looked like this. As stated, the 11th angel, Ireul, did not make a memorable appearance. An angel that had a more powerful impact on the viewer, due to it's notable "angel tower" moment, was the 16th angel, Armisael. Armisael defeated both Shinji and Rei in battle and finally came to a halt when Rei consciously self-destructed her Evangelion, taking her life and the angel with it. Here is Armisael. Now that these two angels are on the board, we can proceed with the rest of the 12th angel. Hold onto your seat - this is uncharted territory. Moments before Rei decapitates Mark 06, there is a moaning sound heard coming from within Mark 06. Mark 06's visor glows red as the camera zooms in on it. Asuka states that the 12th angel is still alive. Indeed it is. However, Asuka's line serves as a misdirection to the action in front of us. Mark 06's visor is glowing red with the same rash that Ireul exhibits from the TV series. Ireul, the 11th angel, is trapped inside Mark 06 with the 12th. Not only is Ireul trapped [s]with Leliel,[/s] but the 12th angel is also shown to behave like Ireul. If you remember, Ireul has a very peculiar geometrical pattern to it's AT field(see above). This same pattern is also seen after Rei removes Mark 06's head. (If you look moments before the head is removed, you'll see that inside the neck of Mark 06, there is a mixing sound and sensation. The neck even bulges a few times while 06 is twisting around.) Ireul [s]and Leliel[/s] then wrap around Unit 13 and form the "metal ball", which becomes an embryo. Before we continue, I would like to make a very strong point here: Kaworu states that he has fallen from the [s]13th[/s] 1st to the 12th angel. This is likely because of the Angel combination that we can see here.[s] If the 11th and 12th angel are one, then Kaworu is not the 13th - he is the 12th.[/s] He has fallen and obviously he has not taken note of the Angel mixing in Mark 06's body before entering the Dogma. [s]There is a reason why this halo is multi-coloured. There is a reason why this halo is not static but rather, appears as a puff of smoke, being blown out from Mark 06. The reason is simple: there is a phenomenon occurring inside Mark 06's body unlike what we've seen yet in the Evangelion series. That phenomenon is a breeding of angels.[/s] [s]However, so far, we have named two angels. There are not just two angels involved in this concoction. [/s]If you'll recall, there are two streams that flow out of Mark 06's open neck. Could this be something simple, like the Angel river just breaking apart on it's own? Take a closer look. [s]The[/s] Ireul[s]-Leliel combination[/s] is actually weaving in and out of itself, in the same way that Armisael does. And so, Armisael is in the mix too. Armisael's angel symbol from NGE is womb. Don't believe me? Why else would an angel flow out of Mark 06's neck the way it did? That isn't a trait of Ireul. [s]That isn't a trait of Leliel.[/s] The double helix stretching line trait can only come from Armisael. The 11th [s]12th,[/s] and 16th angel are now together. Don't unbuckle your seats quite yet. Sandalphon, the 8th angel, also makes an appearance. From the TV series, Sandalphon appears as an embryo . It however undergoes rapid growth into it's larger adult adult angel form, upon which it also happens to cry out like a baby. Does this ring any bells? To add to this, Sandalphon is also a creature that is capable of withstanding immense heat and pressure. If you'll notice, inside the embryo, Unit 13 is contained. Unit 13's shoulder plating is smashed open from what appears to be pressure, where Unit 13 then begins growing it's long shoulder limbs out of what appears to be rock at first. Sandalphon is also known to undergo drastic growth in a short time, similar to what happened to Unit 13. This all occurs while children are heard laughing in the background. Sandalphon is a bit of a stretch unless you consider that Unit 13's form was altered inside a core of an angel, which was likely a very high pressure environment. It was altered in a very quick matter of time too. Sandalphon's symbol from NGE is embryo. The shoulders are built up, the breed of angel shrinks to a bite-sized core for Unit 13, and Unit 13 consumes this core, thus awakening. [s]An important point to note here is that Leliel, from the TV series, is capable of communicating with the Dirac Sea, an alternate dimension. This could potentially have a connection to the Door of Guf, but it is likely responsible for the sudden shrink in the embryo size.[/s] Leftovers, because it's 4am: Israfel is an angel that was fought in 2 halves. One half was named alpha and one, beta, similar to how Shinji and Kaworu were coded in the double-entry system for Evangelion Unit 13. Israfel's angel symbol was music.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Feb 28, 2014 5:23 am First, when the shell of Mark.06 was freed of the spear, Asuka and Shinji's radar only detected the 12th Angel, if the 11th was here too it would had been detected too, and if they already merged the pattern would be different and a "13th Angel" would had been detected. Also, Kaworu never was the 12th Angel, he was the First . As for the similarities with other Angels, while there were mixing of designs and power(Sahaquiel's first form had Matarael's eyes, and the disco-ball just before transforming int o its final form looked like Leliel, and Zeruel's absorption of EVA-00 was reminiscent of Armisael), the 12th Angel is clearly based on Armisael : the double-helix pattern, the flying, it's power of fusing with an Evangelion(like it did with EVA-00 in NGE), and Leliel and Ireul's power have nothing to do with what we saw here : Ireul only attacks electrical systems(the Eva simulation body was just an "Hard Drive" for him to be stoked until he finishes to hack the Magi) and Leliel opens a portal to a pocket dimension, powers that the 12th Angel never exhibited. Concerning the halos, the flashing, multi-colored one is fairly common among the Angels and certain Evas, it's more of an indication of when one is charging an attack or a power : Halos, halos everywhere  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Feb 28, 2014 7:53 am Also it wasn't two stems out of Mark. 06's neck, it was one stem from its neck and one from it's severed head.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Feb 28, 2014 2:23 pm Okay, I will point this out before I address any posts people have typed up: yesterday I was a little tired when I wrote this theory. The biggest mistake I made, which I realized after I finished this theory, was that the number coding of the angels in the Rebuild is different than that of NGE. So when I was writing about the 12th angel in the Rebuild, I was, initially, writing about the 12th angel in NGE. That was an immediate error on my fault, because after I took a look at the coding again, I remembered that the numbers were shaken up. Like, a lot. However, that aside, my theory still stands in this sense: the 12th angel in Q expressed the behavior of various angels in NGE in the same ways I described, which was odd, but still very important to keep in mind. I'm leaving this here to amend this onto my first post, because though it was an error on my part, it does not necessarily disqualify my theory. ElMariachi wrote: First, when the shell of Mark.06 was freed of the spear, Asuka and Shinji's radar only detected the 12th Angel, if the 11th was here too it would had been detected too, and if they already merged the pattern would be different and a "13th Angel" would had been detected.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sat Mar 01, 2014 1:12 am Just honestly, this is a massive, massive stretch, and there is no chance it's accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 01, 2014 8:09 am @ unitM : As I said, various Angels in Rebuild had visual call-backs to Angels from NGE, but that was just for the cameo : Sahaquiel had Matarael eyes and Leliel's shape but wasn't seen spiting acid or opening interdimensional gates. I do see the aspects of the 12th Angel that are similar to Ireul, but they are no more that a nice cameo, these two little detail apart, all of the 12th is reminiscent of Armisael, who had the power to infect and possess an Evangelion. As for SEELE conduction experiments on the 3rd Angel, it wasn't hided to the audience : SEELE's logo was also littering the walls of the tunnels in Bethany Base, and later in the movie Gendo explicitly states that SEELE was experimenting on the Angel and that the destruction of Bethany Base will put an huge delay on their researches.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 01, 2014 9:36 am You’re all wrong. Rei II (as the 2nd Angel Lilith) was demoted to the position of the 12th Angel, just like Kaworu (as the 1th Angel Adam) would later be demoted to the position of the 13th Angel. This is probably why no one was able to find Rei inside Unit 01 to begin with. She literally wasn’t there. Whatever spear Kaworu lunged into Unit 01 was used to separate Lilith’s soul from Unit 01 and place inside Mark.06. (The sear seemed to have a similar effect on Kaowru, demoting him to the 13th Angel when he stabbed Unit 13.) After Lilith was turned into a corpse, the soul was reinstated as a giant embryonic Angelic form gestating inside the body of Mark.06. When Rei Q decapitated Mark.06, it was able to escape to is could be swallowed by Unit 13. That’s the only reason I can think of as to why it morphed into Rei’s face, as the soulless Rei Q witnessed, asking “Is this me?” (We know Rei Q doesn’t possess her true soul, because Kaworu himself said that it was somewhere else.) On that same note, Yui wasn’t able to be found inside Unit 01 either. Ritsuko made a note that Shinji was the only inhabitant they found in there. On top of all that, Shinji has a 0% Sync Ratio with Unit 01, meaning that there probably isn’t anyone inside to sync up with. Yui’s soul is probably inside the SDAT Player, simply so that she can keep watch over Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Mar 01, 2014 9:48 am ^I agree with ElMariachi. With all the changes to the Angel pantheon (the addition of Tunniel and Clockiel, and the removal of others such as Arael and Israfel it's a bit of a stretch to associate certain Rebuild!Angels with NGE Angels just based on physical similarities. Sahaquiel is almost completely different from its original appearance (aside from being a giant flying eye, its colouring and body shape are completely different, and its abilities have been augmented as well such as the addition of a movable core and a humanoid body hanging from the lower side) and initially appears in a Leliel-like ball. Zeruel is similar to its NGE form but is still a clearly distinct being (different colouring, method of locomotion, different body, not to mention what it becomes after absorbing Eva-00). Even Bardiel has been given a makeover and additional abilities. I highly doubt that what unitM refers to as 'Ireul' is a separate Angel. I'm pretty sure if there were two Angels Eva-02 and Eva-08 would detect them; arguing about a possible 'wrong readign' is ridiculous considering how far Eva technology has come by now (so what if loads of ridiculous things have happened? It shouldn't affect whatever Angel-meter the Evas have; the Wunder even detected Eva-13's activation correctly). Furthermore, neither Asuka nor Mari comments on the presence of an Eleventh Angel, although they do comment on the presence on the Twelfth; there is never any indication given by any character that there is more than one Angel in the room. If something that important had happened, there would at least have been a hint or an offhand comment, but there are not. The behaviour of 'Ireul' is also drastically different from the 'bacterial infection' that NGE!Ireul performed. NGE!Ireul directly controlled Rei's simulation body, and it is implied that something similar would have happened to the Evas if they were allowed in contact with it. However, when we see the Twelfth Angel in Rebuild, it does not attempt to control the Mark.06 but instead it bumps around the armor looking for a way out, prompting Rei to release it from its flesh prison. This is at odds with the behaviour of Ireul, which seems to work by controlling larger and more powerful entities for its own benefit (the simulation bodies, and later the Magi supercomputers). It is comparable to Armisael in some ways, but again does not seem to try and fuse with Eva-13 (it just makes a big ball, for whatever reason) so again it seems to be a different Angel. The hexgaonal AT Field isn't exactly a big similarity; NGE is full of hexagons, from that flash up whenever an Angel attacks, to the red hexagons on the walls of Terminal Dogma. The most likely answer is that while it is similar to previous NGE Angels, it is a different beast altogether. The new Angels have some traits from their predecessors (Tunniel resembles Gaghiel; Clockiel resembles Matarael) but in the end they are different. As for the Third Angel's SEELE logo, I'd say the fact that the mark was tattooed on its forehead in red ink was a pretty explicit way to show it, as long as you look close enough.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 01, 2014 10:14 am @ Freaky : I don't know if it's a joke comment or not, but assuming it's not, WILLE's researches boiled down to look in EVA-01's entry plug and take anything that was out of the ordinary, which means Shinji and the SDAT. They probably think that she flat-out died or that she's trapped inside EVA-01's core like Yui and that it's impossible to bring her back, and since EVA-01 is now a world-ending god and their flagship battery, I really doubt that they will try to tamper with its core to see if they can recuperate Rei, if it's even possible, Shinji had to use an Evangelion at full godly power that triggered an Impact to extract Rei from Zeruel after all. Fuyutsuki said that Rei II and Yui are both trapped inside EVA-01, meaning its core(Rei even became a giant core shaped like herself at the end of 2.0), and SEELE and neo-NERV seems to know everything about how the ADAMs, Angel, spears and other funky FAR technology works and what it's supposed to do, if he saids that Yui and Rei are still inside, then they have good reasons to think that they are indeed inside EVA-01, lying to Shinji about it wouldn't had served then.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 01, 2014 11:22 am Well, it’s not quite a joke comment. It’s a theory I’ve been pondering for a bit, but I always tend to hold my theories very loosely and don’t dogmatically hold onto anything since this is Evangelion and anything is possible. (Example, I don’t find it very likely at all that NTE is a sequel to NGE, but I wouldn’t be opposed to the idea of FINAL lays all of its cards on the table and somehow proves that it was in a convincing manner.) Heck, I was just spitballing wham I thought that the whole mouth/eating motif in 2.22 was important. I had no clue that Q was gonna actually take that and actually rip open an entire oral cavity in the Earth’s crust. So, it’s an idea that I’m interested in, but one that I am holding loosely because it might be contradicted by parts of the film I hadn’t noticed yet, or by the events in FINAL. ElMariachi wrote: Fuyutsuki said that Rei II and Yui are both trapped inside EVA-01, meaning its core(Rei even became a giant core shaped like herself at the end of 2.0), and SEELE and neo-NERV seems to know everything about how the ADAMs, Angel, spears and other funky FAR technology works and what it’s supposed to do, if he saids that Yui and Rei are still inside, then they have good reasons to think that they are indeed inside EVA-01, lying to Shinji about it wouldn’t had served then.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 01, 2014 12:39 pm About the SDAT, the problem is that we aren't in Harry Potter with its Horcruxes, you can't cram a soul in the first object within your reach, so far only alive bodies and cores are able to contain a soul, and if the SDAT suddenly manifested biological parts or a core inside it, Ritsuko would had never gave it back to Shinji. Besides if Yui really wanted to keep watch over Shinji, then she did a very shitty job at it, because there was a ton of moments where her son needed some help and a comforting voice, after his mental breakdown or when he was about to get the spears.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 01, 2014 12:50 pm True. At best the SDAT Player probably shouldn’t be interpreted as anything more than just a symbol or a metaphor. For whatever reason Ritsuko probably just doesn’t have the means of detecting Yui or her clone inside Unit 01. I’m still considering the idea of Lilith’s soul being demoted to the 12th Angel. It would at least explain why the Angel took on Rei’s shape as it transformed to an embryonic shape. And since Kaworu was demoted from 1st Angel to 13th Angel when Unit 13 was speared, it’s not far fetched in this Eva-verse that the same wouldn’t have happened to Rei II’s soul, if she does in fact carry the soul of the 2nd Angel. If that is the case, then I wonder how Gendo intends to use Yui’s clone, and whether or not he’ll refuse Lilith’s soul with Rei II’s body. But much if my theory is speculation, which is why I’m not dogmatically holding onto it.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sat Mar 01, 2014 2:57 pm @ElMariachi No, the SEELE logo was not explicit to the audience. True, it was posted around. That is a lot different than it being explicit. Further, having SEELE tattooed on walls and having SEELE tattooed on angels are two very different things. This is not a fight I consider worth talking about. That part of the Rebuild was not explicitly pointed out to the audience. @Shino65, they don't have to be separate angels. What I'm really trying to point out is that the 12th behaves a lot like other angels, a point many people may have missed. There are clear pieces of evidence that I've presented that shows that much and I'm not fond of responses that are simply "well that's a stretch dude" right now. It would be a stretch if what I'm saying wasn't physically there. But it is. The same contamination we've seen with the Ireul infection is there on the 12th and the same miniature AT field pattern that Ireul exhibits is there as well. Does it behave like Ireul? No. And I've admitted that. But that is not a turning point where suddenly, everything I've said was wrong. Your comments on the behavior of Ireul are noted, but we also know, from NGE, that Ireul is an intelligent angel. We also don't know very much about Ireul. Just because it infected simulation bodies does not mean it only infects simulation bodies, for example. We do know how it's AT field looks - tiny multiple hexagon patterns. Sure, there's a possibility that there's nothing there. But there is evidence for what I am pointing out, and unfortunately, evidence tops "you're just looking to deep into it, dude." Ireul does not try and fuse with Eva 13 but Armisael is known for behaving that way. That is why I'm pointing out that the 12th behaves like both. There was plenty of hints - the visor point, as I noted, and the hexagonal patterns. Those fall under "if you look close enough," which I did. People have noticed the visor in the past but no one has connected it to Ireul. Likewise, people have noticed the stream of the 12th, but no one has connected the small multitude of hexagons to Ireul.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 01, 2014 3:23 pm @ FreakyFilmFan4ever : I think it's simply that for WILLE, once someone get at a too high plug depth and is absorbed by the Evangelion, it's game over and any recovery is impossible. It stands to reason that they probably tried a salvage operation after Yui's Contact Experiment and that it failed, and from here they came to the conclusion that once absorbed, it's over. Shinji coming back is a complete anomaly, and treat as such by WILLE, hence the "BM-03" codename, tentative name and questions about if the Shinji in front of them is really Shinji or... something else. It's implied that the entry plug Shinji used at the end of 2.0 stayed inside EVA-01 during the 14 years, it's possible that since EVA-01 became a volatile god, no salvage operations were attempted and the Eva was sent into space to get rid of it, so maybe Shinji could come back because his "primordial soup" was still inside the entry plug, unlike Rei whose body was destroyed when Zeruel absorbed it(from here her comment that she can't live "anywhere else but here" when Shinji was trying to save her in 2.0) Or maybe it's possible that Yui and Rei don't want to get out of EVA-01 for some reason, but rematerialized Shinji because his fate wasn't to stay in EVA-01 forever. But everyone interpreted Yui not coming back as that it's impossible to come back from an absorption. As for Lilith being demoted to 12th Angel, we saw the 12th Angel, it's that weird flying black snake thing, besides it's said since 1.0 that there's supposed to be only 12th Angels, so if Lilith was demoted to 12th, then the 12th should had become the 13th and Kaworu later been demoted to 14th Angel, not 13th. unitM wrote: @ElMariachi No, the SEELE logo was not explicit to the audience. True, it was posted around. That is a lot different than it being explicit. Further, having SEELE tattooed on walls and having SEELE tattooed on angels are two very different things. This is not a fight I consider worth talking about. That part of the Rebuild was not explicitly pointed out to the audience.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sat Mar 01, 2014 6:45 pm By the way , who demoted Kaworu and Rei ?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Mar 01, 2014 7:23 pm I think the spears just have that effect on Angels. @ElMaiachi, I was thinking Lilith WAS the black snake angel, which is why it formed into Rei's face, the inly human form it would have been familiar with. The only other explanation that I can think of is if Lilith had merged with a pre-existing 12th Angel. But who knows at this point...

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Mar 01, 2014 7:26 pm airman4 wrote: By the way , who demoted Kaworu and Rei ?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 01, 2014 7:35 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I think the spears just have that effect on Angels. @ElMaiachi, I was thinking Lilith WAS the black snake angel, which is why it formed into Rei's face, the inly human form it would have been familiar with. The only other explanation that I can think of is if Lilith had merged with a pre-existing 12th Angel. But who knows at this point...

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Mar 02, 2014 7:38 am @unitM: If you're saying it's a singular Angel that is incorporating traits from both Armisael and Ireul I would agree with you. However, I would still disagree with the possibility of 'Ireul' being the Eleventh in Rebuild and Lilith being the Twelfth. Lilith is quite conclusively dead- if the fact that her head has been chopped off and her body is significantly decomposed wasn't enough, Kaworu himself refers to her 'corpse', indicating that she has been killed. Her body also bursts into LCL in a manner startlingly similar to the ATF collapse witnessed in other Angels (like Ramiel) after the Spears are removed, again suggesting that she was dead. This LCL does not move or do anything at all; instead the Mark.06 with the Twelfth imprisoned inside it is left floating over the still liquid, again implying that Lilith is truly dead. If she was alive, wouldn't there have been some indication of it? But she explodes without displaying a single sign of life. Only one Blood Type: Blue is detected- the Twelfth Angel, 'Ireul'- and it is detected by both Eva-13 and Eva-02; if there were two Angels present, don't you think they'd have detected it? Considering, once again, that even the mere activation of a new Eva can be detected by Wille's equipment, the possibility of a second Angel evading detection seems a bit ludicrous. Shinji. Mari and Asuka also refer to the Angel in the singular, rather than the plural. I was under the impression that the Twelfth Angel transforming into Rei's head was due to the interaction with the LCL Lilith released after she exploded, possibly fusing with Lilith's remains.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 02, 2014 1:17 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: I was under the impression that the Twelfth Angel transforming into Rei's head was due to the interaction with the LCL Lilith released after she exploded, possibly fusing with Lilith's remains.

]If you'll recall, there are two streams that flow out of Mark 06's open neck. Could this be something simple, like the Angel river just breaking apart on it's own? Take a closer look. [s]The[/s] Ireul[s]-Leliel combination[/s] is actually weaving in and out of itself, in the same way that Armisael does. And so, Armisael is in the mix too. Armisael's angel symbol from NGE is womb. Don't believe me? Why else would an angel flow out of Mark 06's neck the way it did? That isn't a trait of Ireul. [s]That isn't a trait of Leliel.[/s] The double helix stretching line trait can only come from Armisael. The 11th [s]12th,[/s] and 16th angel are now together. Don't unbuckle your seats quite yet. Sandalphon, the 8th angel, also makes an appearance. From the TV series, Sandalphon appears as an embryo . It however undergoes rapid growth into it's larger adult adult angel form, upon which it also happens to cry out like a baby. Does this ring any bells? To add to this, Sandalphon is also a creature that is capable of withstanding immense heat and pressure. If you'll notice, inside the embryo, Unit 13 is contained. Unit 13's shoulder plating is smashed open from what appears to be pressure, where Unit 13 then begins growing it's long shoulder limbs out of what appears to be rock at first. Sandalphon is also known to undergo drastic growth in a short time, similar to what happened to Unit 13. This all occurs while children are heard laughing in the background. Sandalphon is a bit of a stretch unless you consider that Unit 13's form was altered inside a core of an angel, which was likely a very high pressure environment. It was altered in a very quick matter of time too. Sandalphon's symbol from NGE is embryo. The shoulders are built up, the breed of angel shrinks to a bite-sized core for Unit 13, and Unit 13 consumes this core, thus awakening. [s]An important point to note here is that Leliel, from the TV series, is capable of communicating with the Dirac Sea, an alternate dimension. This could potentially have a connection to the Door of Guf,

 thus awakening. [s]An important point to note here is that Leliel, from the TV series, is capable of communicating with the Dirac Sea, an alternate dimension. []:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Mar 01, 2014 9:48 am ^I agree with ElMariachi. With all the changes to the Angel pantheon (the addition of Tunniel and Clockiel, and the removal of others such as Arael and Israfel it's a bit of a stretch to associate certain Rebuild!Angels with NGE Angels just based on physical similarities. Sahaquiel is almost completely different from its original appearance (aside from being a giant flying eye, its colouring and body shape are completely different, and its abilities have been augmented as well such as the addition of a movable core and a humanoid body hanging from the lower side) and initially appears in a Leliel-like ball. Zeruel is similar to its NGE form but is still a clearly distinct being (different colouring, method of locomotion, different body, not to mention what it becomes after absorbing Eva-00). Even Bardiel has been given a makeover and additional abilities. I highly doubt that what unitM refers to as 'Ireul' is a separate Angel. I'm pretty sure if there were two Angels Eva-02 and Eva-08 would detect them; arguing about a possible 'wrong readign' is ridiculous considering how far Eva technology has come by now (so what if loads of ridiculous things have happened? It shouldn't affect whatever Angel-meter the Evas have; the Wunder even detected Eva-13's activation correctly). Furthermore, neither Asuka nor Mari comments on the presence of an Eleventh Angel, although they do comment on the presence on the Twelfth; there is never any indication given by any character that there is more than one Angel in the room. If something that important had happened, there would at least have been a hint or an offhand comment, but there are not. The behaviour of 'Ireul' is also drastically different from the 'b

Article: We all missed what the 12th Angel really is in Q
 more than one Angel in the room. If something that important had happened, there would at least have been a hint or an offhand comment, but there are not. The behaviour of 'Ireul' is also drastically different from the 'bacterial infection' that NGE!Ireul performed. NGE!Ireul directly controlled Rei's simulation body, and it is implied that something similar would have happened to the Evas if they were allowed in contact with it. However, when we see the Twelfth Angel in Rebuild, it does not attempt to control the Mark.06 but instead it bumps around the armor looking for a way out, prompting Rei to release it from its flesh prison. This is at odds with the behaviour of Ireul, which seems to work by controlling larger and more powerful entities for its own benefit (the simulation bodies, and later the Magi supercomputers). It is comparable to Armisael in some ways, but again does not seem to try and fuse with Eva-13 (it just makes a big ball, for whatever reason) so again it seems to be a different Angel. The hexgaonal AT Field isn't exactly a big similarity; NGE is full of hexagons, from that flash up whenever an Angel attacks, to the red hexagons on the walls of Terminal Dogma. The most likely answer is that while it is similar to previous NGE Angels, it is a different beast altogether. The new Angels have some traits from their predecessors (Tunniel resembles Gaghiel; Clockiel resembles Matarael) but in the end they are different. As for the Third Angel's SEELE logo, I'd say the fact that the mark was tattooed on its forehead in red ink was a pretty explicit way to show it, as long as you look close enough.
